claims.claim: Homepage publicly accessible and value proposition clearly stated
claims.evidence: Langflow is a powerful tool to build and deploy AI agents and MCP servers.

claims.claim: Pricing page discoverable in 2 clicks from homepage
claims.evidence: The homepage does not contain a link to the pricing page, only links to Docs and Get Started for Free.

claims.claim: Documentation or live demo accessible without login
claims.evidence: The homepage includes a link to 'Docs' which implies documentation is accessible without login.

claims.claim: Integration list or supported frameworks documented
claims.evidence: Langflow supports all major LLMs, vector databases and a growing library of AI tools.

claims.claim: Authentication / data handling claims publicly stated
claims.evidence: The new LANGFLOW_ALLOW_CUSTOM_COMPONENTS environment variable allows Langflow administrators to disable execution of custom Python components, which improves security in controlled deployments.
